title: physodia pusilla
intro: Physodia pusilla, also known as the tiny club moss or dwarf club moss, is a low-growing, evergreen plant species that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. Traditionally, Physodia pusilla has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Physodia pusilla include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Physodia pusilla is typically harvested and prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with some cultures also using the plant's rhizomes to make medicinal tinctures.
